organic-every-year-africans-working-abro.hook: Every year, Africans working abroad send billions home — and lose MILLIONS to fees. Here's the app that stops that.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-8s): Creator on camera, stat overlay: 'Diaspora sends $48B/yr — avg 6% fee = $2.8B lost.' Beat 2 (9-25s): Screen-record of a traditional transfer app showing $14 fee on a $200 send. Beat 3 (26-45s): Screen-record of Speed Wallet same send, $0 fee, arrives in seconds. Beat 4 (46-58s): Creator back on camera — 'Download Speed. Your family keeps every dollar.'
payload.production_notes: Film talking-head segments at eye level, natural light. Use TikTok native captions. Screen-record on a separate phone or emulator. Add $ fee callout text overlays in CapCut. No music needed — silence on the fee reveal is intentional.

organic-let-s-clear-the-confusion-you-do.hook: Let's clear the confusion: you do NOT need a crypto wallet, a Coinbase account, or a bank to receive Bitcoin. Watch.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-6s): Direct address to camera, debunking tone. Beat 2 (7-20s): Quick myth-busting text cards — 'No exchange needed ✅ No KYC to receive ✅ No minimum ✅.' Beat 3 (21-45s): Screen-record of someone sending $5 of BTC via Speed Lightning address in under 10 seconds. Beat 4 (46-58s): 'This is Lightning Bitcoin. Speed Wallet. Link in bio.'
payload.production_notes: Text cards can be built entirely in TikTok's native editor — zero external tools. Keep screen-record at 2x speed with finger tap highlights. Use a green checkmark sound effect for each myth-bust card.

organic-you-don-t-beg-for-money-you-comm.hook: You don't beg for money — you command it. I showed my sister how to send me $200 from the US in 9 seconds.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-5s): Creator confidently addresses camera. Beat 2 (6-20s): Pulls out phone, opens Speed Wallet, shows Lightning address or QR code. Beat 3 (21-42s): Sister's screen-record (filmed separately) shows her sending $200, zero fee, instant confirmation ping on creator's phone. Beat 4 (43-58s): Creator shows balance updated in real time — 'Speed Wallet. Zero fees. Download now.'
payload.production_notes: Cast a real family member or friend for authenticity — UGC relatability drives the 9.9% ER benchmark. Film the 'receive ping' moment close-up for dopamine hit. Vertical 9:16, no tripod needed. Add captions manually for accessibility.

organic-this-bitcoin-chart-pattern-made-.hook: This Bitcoin chart pattern made a 17-year-old $23k — and it's happening again RIGHT NOW.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-6s): Bold claim on screen, creator reacts with controlled skepticism. Beat 2 (7-22s): Pull up a real BTC price chart, circle a historical accumulation pattern (e.g., halving cycle base), overlay with simple annotation. Beat 3 (23-45s): 'The easiest way to start? Buy just $5 of Bitcoin on Speed Wallet — instant, no ID needed to get started.' Screen-record the onboarding. Beat 4 (46-58s): 'Curiosity is free. Waiting isn't. Link in bio.'
payload.production_notes: Use TradingView free chart screenshot — annotate with a red circle in CapCut. Keep energy high in Beat 1 to match the 11.7% ER benchmark tone. Avoid financial advice language — frame as 'what I noticed' not 'what you should do.' Add #crypto #bitcoin #fyp.

organic-igaming-players-hate-this-one-tr.hook: iGaming players hate this one trick: instant withdrawals that actually hit your wallet in under 10 seconds.

payload.outline: Beat 1 (0-5s): Creator at desk, gaming setup visible in background for credibility signal. Beat 2 (6-20s): 'Most crypto casinos say instant — then make you wait 20 minutes for confirmations. Lightning is different.' Text overlay: 'Zero confirmations needed.' Beat 3 (21-45s): Screen-record of a Speed Wallet Lightning withdrawal from a demo or real iGaming platform — timer on screen showing sub-10s arrival. Beat 4 (46-58s): 'Speed Wallet. For players who actually need speed. Link in bio.'
payload.production_notes: Gaming chair or monitor in background adds segment-native credibility. Keep timer overlay large and central — the speed proof IS the ad. Use a subtle 'cash register' or notification sound on arrival. Avoid naming specific casinos to stay compliant.

paid-you-sent-200-home-your-family-got-1.hook: You sent $200 home. Your family got $186. Here's why — and how to stop it.
paid-you-sent-200-home-your-family-got-1.estimate: $1.80-$2.60 (vs $3.17 benchmark — high emotional relevance + specific pain point expected to compress CPI by 18-43%)

payload.problem: Voiceover with animated fee breakdown: 'Wire transfer: $14 fee. Exchange rate markup: hidden 2%. Your family loses nearly 10% every single time. That's $240 a year on a $200/month habit — gone to middlemen.'
payload.solution: Screen-record of Speed Wallet: sender types $200, fee shows $0.00, recipient receives $200.00 in 9 seconds. Real-time notification sound plays. Text overlay: 'Bitcoin Lightning. Zero fees. Instant. Every time.'
payload.cta: Download Speed Wallet. Send your first $1 free. Link below.
payload.audience: Meta — Facebook/Instagram: Lookalike 2% of Latin American and West African diaspora ages 22-45 in the US. Layered with 'international money transfer' and 'Western Union' behavioral interest. Exclude existing crypto power users.

paid-i-bought-my-first-bitcoin-for-5-it-.hook: I bought my first Bitcoin for $5. It took 9 seconds.
paid-i-bought-my-first-bitcoin-for-5-it-.estimate: $2.40-$3.10 (vs $3.17 benchmark — UGC format and low barrier entry message expected to meet or beat benchmark; test against static image control)

payload.problem: Creator on camera: 'I always thought Bitcoin was complicated — you needed a Coinbase account, ID verification, a bank account, and a week of waiting. I almost gave up before I started.'
payload.solution: Screen-record of Speed Wallet onboarding: app open, Lightning address created, $5 BTC received instantly. Creator reacts: 'That's it. No exchange. No verification for small amounts. Just Bitcoin, instantly, on my phone.'
payload.cta: Try Speed Wallet. Your first Bitcoin in under 60 seconds.
payload.audience: TikTok — Interest targeting: 'cryptocurrency beginner,' 'personal finance,' 'investing for beginners.' Age 18-34. Exclude audiences who follow 5+ crypto accounts (already converted). Lean into TikTok's curiosity-driven discovery feed.

paid-your-casino-says-instant-withdrawal.hook: Your casino says 'instant withdrawal.' Your wallet says otherwise.
paid-your-casino-says-instant-withdrawal.estimate: $2.90-$3.80 (vs $3.17 benchmark — iGaming segment has thinner organic data pool per track counts; expect higher CPIs until creative is optimized; A/B test split-screen vs talking-head format)

payload.problem: Split-screen: left side shows a spinning loader 'Processing withdrawal… 18 minutes remaining' on a generic crypto platform. Right side shows a Speed Wallet Lightning receive notification hitting in 8 seconds. Text: 'On-chain crypto = waiting. Lightning = now.'
payload.solution: Voiceover: 'Speed Wallet runs on Bitcoin Lightning — zero confirmation times, zero fees, compatible with every major Lightning-enabled iGaming platform. Deposit in seconds. Cash out in seconds. No exceptions.'
payload.audience: Meta — Custom audience: users who visited iGaming and crypto casino review sites (pixel retargeting). Layered with interests: 'online poker,' 'sports betting,' 'Bitcoin gambling.' Age 21-45 male skew. Geo: US states where online gambling is legal.
